goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { Multiset.from_list[T](items) = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = multiset_card_from_list[T](items) }

proof: let w0: List[T] satisfy { Multiset.from_list[T](items) = Multiset.from_list[T](w0) and w0.length = multiset_card_from_list[T](items) }

function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or 0 = x0.length }[T](List.nil[T])

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { Multiset.empty[T] = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = 0 }

function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or 0 = x0.length }[T](List.nil[T])

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { Multiset.singleton(item) = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = 1 }
